name: Sprint 7
goal: Fix the migrate settings-rewrite defect a consumer Instance hit (EXEC-086/087), split the Setup Grill out of the Work Grill (EXEC-083/084), and stamp a CLI quick-reference README into the invariant layout (EXEC-082).

shipped.title: EXEC-086: scope migrate's settings.json rewrite to files it renamed; report dead commands instead of repointing them
shipped.summary: Scope migrateHookLayout's HOOK_COMMAND_REWRITE to exactly the hooks migrate renamed (this or a prior run); report — never rewrite — settings commands pointing at skipped or untracked .js hooks. Confirm or refute the stale-twins hypothesis in the repro. P1 live defect in published 0.5.3 silently killing consumer custom hooks; leads the sprint.

shipped.title: EXEC-082: stamp a CLI quick-reference README into the invariant layout
shipped.summary: Add src/template/.excn/README.md (≤30 lines): one line per CLI verb (init, update, migrate, doctor, view-status, validate) leading with the npm-install-stamps-nothing gotcha. Stamped by init, delivered by update, root mirrored Src-First.

shipped.title: EXEC-087: doctor names dead settings commands and .js/.cjs hook twins
shipped.summary: Extend doctor's per-feature hook health to report each settings.json command whose target file is missing (BROKEN) and each hook present under both .js and .cjs (naming which one settings invokes), covering custom commands too. depends_on EXEC-086.

not_shipped.title: EXEC-083: Setup Grill content moves into the Setup Skill bundle; execution-grill-with-docs serves the Work Grill only
not_shipped.summary: Move the setup-interview content into src/SKILL.md's own npm bundle so the Setup Skill stops invoking the Work-Grill-specific execution-grill-with-docs; SKILL.md works standalone for an npm-path adopter. execution-grill-with-docs stays byte-unchanged.

not_shipped.title: EXEC-084: doc sweep — the two grills' descriptions stop implying a shared skill
not_shipped.summary: After EXEC-083, sweep CONTEXT.md, PROCESS.md, and their template seeds so each grill's docs name only its own skill(s); chartered persistent-doc edits travel the alignment gate. depends_on EXEC-083.

decisions.title: S7-3 execution routing: team-lead ownership of src/template content
decisions.summary: S7-3 (EXEC-082, src/template content) was executed by team-lead although the item's owner field reads builder, because TEAM_DIRECTIVE.md's roster forbids builder from src/template content and owns it to the Team Lead. Date 2026-06-12.

step_log.summary: Ratified at sprint-7 open — the grill-time Setup Skill glossary addition (npm fresh-install path: `npm install to-execution` then read/follow node_modules/to-execution/SKILL.md; official skill/plugin-surface publication tracked as EXEC-085) stays as written. alignment cycle-2 PASS (2026-06-12, session_progress.json): grill-time term resolution under the SKILL.md pen rule, no open sprint at the time (sprint 6 closed 2026-06-11).
PASS — 0 violations. Chartered definition change per EXEC-086 acceptance criteria (ADR-0004 path, EXEC-069 precedent); Team Lead approved; verdict in session_progress.json.

PASS — 0 violations. hookCommandMigrated/rewriteHookCommands helpers single-purpose; CJS_HOOK_EXTENSION/LEGACY_HOOK_EXTENSION named constants; dead HOOK_COMMAND_REWRITE.replacement removed; JSDoc + truthful comments hold; verdict in session_progress.json.
